properties.query:
let _azfunc = CyberSixgill_Alerts_CL
| extend
    Id = column_ifexists('id_s', ''),
    AlertDate = column_ifexists('date_s', ''),
    AlertTitle = column_ifexists('title_s', ''),
    AlertName = column_ifexists('alert_name_s', ''),
    AlertTypeId = column_ifexists('alert_type_id_s', ''),
    Content = column_ifexists('content_s', ''),
    Severity = toint(column_ifexists('Severity', column_ifexists('severity_d', int(null)))),
    ThreatLevel = column_ifexists('threat_level_s', ''),
    Threats = column_ifexists('threats_s', ''),
    EsId = column_ifexists('es_id_s', ''),
    UserId = column_ifexists('user_id_s', ''),
    AlertCreationDate = todatetime(column_ifexists('alert_creation_date_s', '')),
    Time = column_ifexists('_time_s', ''),
    Read = tobool(column_ifexists('read_b', bool(null))),
    Site = column_ifexists('site_s', ''),
    Assets = column_ifexists('assets_s', ''),
    MatchedAssetsBins = column_ifexists('matched_assets_bins_s', ''),
    MatchedAssetsDomainNames = column_ifexists('matched_assets_domain_names_s', ''),
    SubAlertsCount = toreal(column_ifexists('sub_alerts_count_d', real(null))),
    StatusName = column_ifexists('status_name_s', ''),
    ThreatActor = column_ifexists('threat_actor_s', ''),
    ThreatSource = column_ifexists('threat_source_s', ''),
    PortalUrl = column_ifexists('portal_url_s', ''),
    Cve = column_ifexists('cve_s', ''),
    CveUrl = column_ifexists('cve_url_s', ''),
    CyberSixgillCvss31 = toreal(column_ifexists('cybersixgillcvss31_d', real(null))),
    CyberSixgillCvss20 = toreal(column_ifexists('cybersixgillcvss20_d', real(null))),
    CyberSixgillDveScore = toreal(column_ifexists('cybersixgilldvescore_d', real(null))),
    OrganizationName = column_ifexists('organization_name_s', ''),
    ActorUrlWithContext = column_ifexists('actor_url_with_context_s', ''),
    ActorUrlWithoutContext = column_ifexists('actor_url_without_context_s', ''),
    ParentId = tostring(column_ifexists('parent_id_s', '')),
    UniqueId = tostring(column_ifexists('unique_id_s', column_ifexists('id_s', ''))),
    SubAggregateAlertId = tolong(column_ifexists('aggregate_alert_id_d', long(null))),
    CredentialEmail = tostring(column_ifexists('credential_email_s', '')),
    StealerFamily = tostring(column_ifexists('stealer_family_s', '')),
    LeakedPasswordHash = tostring(column_ifexists('leaked_password_hash_s', '')),
    SubAlertDetails = dynamic({})
| project TimeGenerated, Id, AlertDate, AlertTitle, AlertName, AlertTypeId, Content, Severity, ThreatLevel, Threats, EsId, UserId, AlertCreationDate, Time, Read, Site, Assets, MatchedAssetsBins, MatchedAssetsDomainNames, SubAlertsCount, StatusName, ThreatActor, ThreatSource, PortalUrl, Cve, CveUrl, CyberSixgillCvss31, CyberSixgillCvss20, CyberSixgillDveScore, OrganizationName, ActorUrlWithContext, ActorUrlWithoutContext, ParentId, UniqueId, SubAggregateAlertId, CredentialEmail, StealerFamily, LeakedPasswordHash, SubAlertDetails;
let _ccf_parents = CyberSixgillAlertsV2_CL
| extend
    ParentId = '',
    UniqueId = Id,
    SubAggregateAlertId = long(null),
    CredentialEmail = '',
    StealerFamily = '',
    LeakedPasswordHash = '',
    SubAlertDetails = dynamic({})
| project TimeGenerated, Id, AlertDate, AlertTitle, AlertName, AlertTypeId, Content, Severity, ThreatLevel, Threats, EsId, UserId, AlertCreationDate, Time, Read, Site, Assets, MatchedAssetsBins, MatchedAssetsDomainNames, SubAlertsCount, StatusName, ThreatActor, ThreatSource, PortalUrl, Cve, CveUrl, CyberSixgillCvss31, CyberSixgillCvss20, CyberSixgillDveScore, OrganizationName, ActorUrlWithContext, ActorUrlWithoutContext, ParentId, UniqueId, SubAggregateAlertId, CredentialEmail, StealerFamily, LeakedPasswordHash, SubAlertDetails;
let _ccf_children = CyberSixgillAlertsV2_CL
| where SubAlertsCount > 0 and isnotnull(SubAlerts)
| mv-expand _sub = SubAlerts to typeof(dynamic)
| extend
    ParentId = Id,
    UniqueId = strcat(Id, '__', tostring(_sub.aggregate_alert_id)),
    SubAggregateAlertId = tolong(_sub.aggregate_alert_id),
    CredentialEmail = tostring(_sub.credential_email),
    StealerFamily = tostring(_sub.stealer_family),
    LeakedPasswordHash = tostring(_sub.leaked_password_hash),
    SubAlertDetails = _sub
| project TimeGenerated, Id, AlertDate, AlertTitle, AlertName, AlertTypeId, Content, Severity, ThreatLevel, Threats, EsId, UserId, AlertCreationDate, Time, Read, Site, Assets, MatchedAssetsBins, MatchedAssetsDomainNames, SubAlertsCount, StatusName, ThreatActor, ThreatSource, PortalUrl, Cve, CveUrl, CyberSixgillCvss31, CyberSixgillCvss20, CyberSixgillDveScore, OrganizationName, ActorUrlWithContext, ActorUrlWithoutContext, ParentId, UniqueId, SubAggregateAlertId, CredentialEmail, StealerFamily, LeakedPasswordHash, SubAlertDetails;
union isfuzzy=true _azfunc, _ccf_parents, _ccf_children
